title: Hexxit Reborn
description: A fresh touch of Hexxit with completely new mods and mechanics!
body:
##
### We've taken the ***classic Hexxit experience*** and **spiced it up** with a bunch of **new mods** and **mechanics** that'll keep you glued to your screen.
##


Get ready to explore exciting **new dimensions**, battle **tough enemies**, and uncover **dungeons bursting with loot**. 

**Crafting fans** will love the expanded options for **gear, weapons, and tools**. But watch out—danger lurks around every corner, from **deadly dungeons** to **roaming monsters**.
##
![Village in the night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jjUCPREu/images/ce9ff88136abfe6d38a56654195c35a7bc8aaa74.png)
### The skillpoint mechanic gives the game a new depth.
![SkillZ](https://i.imgur.com/cCuDSvC.png)
> You start with **4** Hearts and **6** Skillpoints, choose your first skillpoints carefully!
